properties.description: User selects a video file, optionally sets a language hint; system validates the file, uploads to object storage, persists Meeting + Recording, enqueues TranscriptionJob.
properties.label: Upload video and create meeting

properties.description: Automated pipeline: dequeue job, fetch video from storage, extract audio, submit to ASR/diarization engine (EXT-02), receive speaker-attributed segments, assemble and persist Transcript.
properties.label: Transcribe audio with diarization

properties.description: After diarization, system scans the transcript for self-introductions and addressed names. Anonymous speaker labels (Speaker 1, Speaker 2...) are substituted with resolved names where confidence is sufficient. Unresolved labels remain.
properties.label: Resolve speaker names in transcript

properties.description: On transcript-ready event, system loads transcript, selects prompt template by language, submits to LLM (EXT-03), parses response into structured Markdown protocol with required sections, persists.
properties.label: Generate meeting protocol via LLM

properties.description: Pipeline failure handling: mark job as failed with error_reason, update Meeting status to failed, surface in UI. Retry strategy (manual vs. auto) TBD.
properties.label: Handle transcription and protocol failures

properties.description: User views and downloads the verbatim transcript from the recording detail page.
properties.label: View and download transcript

properties.description: User opens the generated protocol in an in-app Markdown editor, reviews and edits content, saves changes. Save increments version and edit_count.
properties.label: Review and edit protocol in Markdown editor

properties.description: User clicks Export to PDF; system renders Markdown protocol to PDF via export script and delivers as a download.
properties.label: Export protocol as PDF

properties.description: Cross-cutting: UI surfaces Meeting.status reflecting the pipeline stage (uploading -> transcribing -> transcript_ready -> protocol_generating -> protocol_ready -> edited | failed).
properties.label: Display meeting processing status
